revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[ja:磐椅神社]] {{Expand Japanese|磐椅神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Iwahashi Shrine | native_name = 磐椅神社 | image = Iwahashi shrine.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Iwahashi Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|37.571135|140.104923}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Ōyamatsumi|qid=Q386563|lt=Ōyamatsumi|az|Ooyamatsimu|de|Ōyamatsumi|en|Ōyamatsumi|fa|اویاماتسومی|fr|Ōyamatsumi|hr|O-Yama-Tsu-mi|ja|オオヤマツミ|ko|오야마쓰미노카미|mni|ꯑꯣꯌꯃꯠꯁꯨꯃꯤ|ru|Ооямацуми|simple|Ōyamatsumi|sv|Ōyamatsumi|zh|大山津見|qid=Q386563|1=Ōyamatsumi}} }} {{nihongo|'''Iwahashi Shrine'''|磐椅神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mutsu Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}} * {{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11658590|ltq=Q11658590|qid=Q11658590|1=List of Shikinaisha in Mutsu Province}} * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Mutsu Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Mutsu Province|ja|陸奥国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11658590|1=List of Shikinaisha in Mutsu Province}} ** Series ordinal: 86 ** P155: {{ill|Q135040041|ltq=Q135040041|qid=Q135040041|1=Kokaneyamano Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Q17216962|ltq=Q17216962|qid=Q17216962|1=Shigariwake Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Inawashiro|lt=Inawashiro|arz|ايناواشيرو|ceb|Inawashiro|de|Inawashiro (Fukushima)|en|Inawashiro|envoyage|Inawashiro|es|Inawashiro (Fukushima)|fa|ایناواشیرو، فوکوشیما|fr|Inawashiro|hu|Inavasiro|id|Inawashiro, Fukushima|it|Inawashiro|ja|猪苗代町|ko|이나와시로정|mg|Inawashiro|ms|Inawashiro, Fukushima|my|အိဝနရှိရိုမြို့|no|Inawashiro|pl|Inawashiro|ru|Инавасиро|sv|Inawashiro|tl|Inawashiro, Fukushima|tr|Inawashiro|uk|Інавасіро (Фукусіма)|vi|Inawashiro, Fukushima|zh_yue|豬苗代町|zh|豬苗代町|qid=Q669633|1=Inawashiro}} * {{ill|Q907389|ltq=Q907389|qid=Q907389|1=Mutsu Province}} * {{ill|Q1205228|ltq=Q1205228|qid=Q1205228|1=Yama District, Fukushima}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|37.571135|140.104923}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database == image (P18) == * Iwahashi shrine.jpg == dedicated to (P825) == * {{ill|Q386563|ltq=Q386563|qid=Q386563|1=Ōyamatsumi}} == described by source (P1343) == * {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database (old)|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database (old)|qid=Q135037878|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database (old)}} ** P2699: https://web.archive.org/web/20151121015546/http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp:80/db/jinja/271401.html == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 182123 ** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|ltq=Q135159299|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Q90139226|ltq=Q90139226|qid=Q90139226|1=Ken-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Shinto Directive|lt=Shinto Directive|en|Shinto Directive|fa|بخشنامه شینتو|fr|Directive shinto|id|Pengarahan Shinto|ja|神道指令|zh|神道指令|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == name in kana (P1814) == * いわはしじんじゃ * -サキ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 8380005008134 == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Q135040042|ltq=Q135040042|qid=Q135040042|1=Ihahashino Shrine}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '福島県耶麻郡猪苗代町字西峰6199号', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '福島県耶麻郡猪苗代町西峰', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:磐椅神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11587896}} == Japanese content == {{画像提供依頼|Non-snow season photo (gallery ok)|date=February 2020|cat=耶麻郡}} {{神社 |名称=Iwahashi Shrine |画像=[[ファイル:Iwahashi shrine.jpg|250px|Iwahashi Shrine]]
Torii and worship hall |所在地={{ill|lt=Fukushima Prefecture|Q71707|qid=Q71707|1=Fukushima Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Yama District|Q1205228|qid=Q1205228|1=Yama District, Fukushima}}{{ill|lt=Inawashiro|Q669633|qid=Q669633|1=Inawashiro}} Aza Nishimine 6199 |位置={{Coord|37|34|16.28|N|140|6|17.23|E|scale:5000_region:JP-07_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=Iwahashi Shrine}} |祭神={{ill|qid=Q386563|lt=Ōyamatsumi|Q386563|qid=Q386563|qid=Q386563|lt=Ōyamatsumi-no-Mikoto|1=Ōyamatsumi}}, {{ill|lt=Haniyasuhime|Q9285919|qid=Q9285919|lt=Haniyama-hime-no-Mikoto|1=Haniyasu-hiko and Haniyasu-hime}} |社格={{ill|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}, former prefectural shrine |創建=AD 250 |例祭=Every year on {{ill|lt=Sports Day|Q6978649|qid=Q6978649|1=National Sports Day}} in October |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Fukushima|label=Iwahashi Shrine|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Iwahashi Shrine''' (いわはしじんじゃ) is a shrine in {{ill|lt=Inawashiro|Q669633|qid=Q669633|1=Inawashiro}}, {{ill|lt=Fukushima Prefecture|Q71707|qid=Q71707|1=Fukushima Prefecture}}. Its {{ill|lt=former shrine rank under the modern system|Q712534|qid=Q712534|lt=former rank|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}} was prefectural shrine. === Overview === It is a high-ranking {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} and is said to have been the largest grand shrine in the district. The shrine name derives from the old name of {{ill|lt=Mount Bandai|Q714605|qid=Q714605|1=Mount Bandai}}, "Iwahashiyama," and preserves the history of mountain worship of the sacred mountain itself. In the precincts stands Ōshika-zakura (one of the {{ill|lt=Five Great Cherry Trees of Aizu|Q21652321|qid=Q21652321|1=Five Great Cherry Trees of Aizu}}), said to have been transplanted from Kyoto when an imperial envoy visited during the reign of {{ill|lt=Emperor Murakami|Q374015|qid=Q374015|1=Emperor Murakami}}. {{ill|lt=Hanusaki Shrine|Q11423723|qid=Q11423723|1=Hanitsu Shrine}} is regarded as a subordinate shrine. === Enshrined deities === *{{ill|qid=Q386563|lt=Ōyamatsumi|Q386563|qid=Q386563|qid=Q386563|lt=Ōyamatsumi-no-Mikoto|1=Ōyamatsumi}} *{{ill|lt=Haniyasuhime|Q9285919|qid=Q9285919|lt=Haniyama-hime-no-Mikoto|1=Haniyasu-hiko and Haniyasu-hime}} === History === In the time of Emperor Ōjin, {{ill|lt=Takenouchi no Sukune|Q1073668|qid=Q1073668|1=Takenouchi no Sukune}} enshrined the deities on the summit of Mount Iwahashi. Later, in the time of Emperor Shōmu, it moved to the present location. On September 4, {{ill|lt=1908|Q2056|qid=Q2056|1=1908}} (Meiji 41), {{ill|lt=Prince Arisugawa Takehito|Q875481|qid=Q875481|1=Prince Arisugawa Takehito}} and {{ill|lt=Tokugawa Mieko|Q7004966|qid=Q7004966|lt=Princess Mieko|1=Princess Mieko of Arisugawa}} visited and each planted a pine and a cherry treeHiguchi Mitsutaka, ''Koko Tanshō'' (Kōkan Gakuin, Meiji 43), p.10.. === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === See also === * {{ill|lt=Aizu Fudoki|Q11381284|qid=Q11381284|1=Aizu Fudoki}} * {{ill|lt=Hanusaki Shrine|Q11423723|qid=Q11423723|1=Hanitsu Shrine}} === External links === *[http://iwahashijinja.official.jp/ 磐椅神社] {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Iwahashi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Iwahashi Shrine]][[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mutsu Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Fukushima Prefecture]] [[Category:福島県の旧県社]] [[Category:猪苗代町の歴史]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mutsu Province]] [[Category:猪苗代町の建築物]]
